title: Harvest Reader
description: Adds an item to display information about Harvest Festival crops!
body:
Harvest Reader adds a new item called the "Crop Reader", when you right click a Harvest Festival crop with it, it will give you information about the crop.

The recipe for the Crop Reader is a glass pane and an iron ingot in the flint and steel position in a crafting table

If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via  Patreon.

**This mod requires [Harvest Festival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/harvest-festival).** [![Nodecraft sponsor banner](https://assets.blamejared.com/nodecraft/jared.jpg)](https://nodecraft.com/r/jared) **This project is sponsored by Nodecraft.
